query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): Bectons! and its website www.bectons.com.
Optionnaly here is the address 13, Rue des Vieux Murs, Lille, Hauts-de-France 59800, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
### Executive Summary

Bectons! is not a standalone independent business; it is part of a small, multi-brand restaurant group founded by Germain Magnaval and Geoffroy Abelé [Vozer](https://www.vozer.fr/v/bectons-le-nouveau-spot-pour-manger-bien-et-vite-dans-le-vieux-lille/). Through their distinct legal entities, the founders operate a total of **3 locations** in the CHR sector, comprising one Bectons! location and two establishments under the "Les Frères Pinard" brand [Societe.com](https://www.societe.com/societe/les-freres-pinard-831192737.html). 

### Bectons! Brand Profile and Ownership

Bectons! is a single-location restaurant that opened on December 23, 2025, at 13 rue des Vieux-Murs in the Vieux-Lille district of Lille, France [Actu.fr](https://actu.fr/hauts-de-france/lille_59350/bectons-la-nouvelle-adresse-de-snacking-de-terroir-vous-regale-dans-le-vieux-lille_63644910.html). 

*   **Concept:** The establishment focuses on "classics of snacking revisited with local products" [bectons.com](https://bectons.com/). It offers delivery via Deliveroo [Deliveroo](https://deliveroo.fr/fr/menu/lille/lille-vieux-lille/bectons).
*   **Digital Footprint:** The official website (bectons.com) does not feature a store locator or a "nos restaurants" page, confirming it operates as a single "new spot" rather than a multi-branch chain [bectons.com](https://bectons.com/) [Actu.fr](https://actu.fr/hauts-de-france/lille_59350/vieux-lille-bectons-le-nouveau-resto-sur-le-pouce-des-freres-pinard-aux-produits-100-francais_63162329.html).
*   **Legal Entity:** The restaurant is operated by SNACKING FP, a Simplified Joint Stock Company (SASU) registered on June 24, 2025, under SIREN 988 459 053 [Le Figaro](https://entreprises.lefigaro.fr/snacking-fp-59/entreprise-988459053). 
*   **Acquisition:** SNACKING FP purchased the business assets (fonds de commerce) for the 13 Rue des Vieux Murs location from the previous occupant, a beer cellar named L'ABBAYE DES SAVEURS, for 80,000 euros [Pappers.fr](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/labbaye-des-saveurs-481759363) [Actu.fr](https://actu.fr/hauts-de-france/lille_59350/vieux-lille-bectons-le-nouveau-resto-sur-le-pouce-des-freres-pinard-aux-produits-100-francais_63162329.html).

### Group Affiliation and Total Locations

While Bectons! operates as a single storefront, it is part of a broader CHR portfolio managed by founders Germain Magnaval and Geoffroy Abelé. The founders also own and operate "Les Frères Pinard," a dual-concept wine bar and specialized grocery store [Vozer](https://www.vozer.fr/v/bectons-le-nouveau-spot-pour-manger-bien-et-vite-dans-le-vieux-lille/) [Les Frères Pinard](https://lesfrerespinard.com/). 

Corporate records show a documented relationship between the Bectons! operating company (SNACKING FP) and the Les Frères Pinard operating company [Pappers.fr](https://www.pappers.fr/entreprise/les-freres-pinard-831192737). 

The total group size is **3 locations**, calculated across the founders' two primary CHR legal entities:
1.  **SNACKING FP (SIREN 988 459 053):** Operates **1 location** (Bectons! at 13 rue des Vieux-Murs, Lille) [Actu.fr](https://actu.fr/hauts-de-france/lille_59350/bectons-la-nouvelle-adresse-de-snacking-de-terroir-vous-regale-dans-le-vieux-lille_63644910.html).
2.  **LES FRERES PINARD (SIREN 831 192 737):** Registered as having **2 establishments** [Societe.com](https://www.societe.com/societe/les-freres-pinard-831192737.html). The primary known location is situated nearby at 26-28 bis rue des Vieux Murs, 59800 Lille [Lille Tourism](https://en.lilletourism.com/get-out/the-best-addresses/restaurants/les-freres-pinard-lille-en-4431495/). Notably, 26 rue des Vieux Murs also serves as the registered corporate office for SNACKING FP [Societe.com](https://www.societe.com/societe/l-abbaye-des-saveurs-481759363.html).

### Gaps and Limitations
*   **Holding Company Status:** While a documented relationship exists between SNACKING FP and LES FRERES PINARD, the findings do not specify if a formal parent holding company sits above both SAS entities, or if they are simply sister companies linked by common ownership.
*   **Second Les Frères Pinard Location:** Corporate registries indicate LES FRERES PINARD operates two establishments, but the exact address and operational status of the second establishment are not detailed in the provided findings.
*   **Franchising:** There is no evidence in the findings to suggest either brand currently utilizes a franchise model; all identified locations appear to be corporately owned by the founders.
